channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: CZ floats Binance.US revival to give U.S. users access to global crypto liquidity
item.description: The Binance founder said BNB Chain is the optimal payments rail for automated transactions between AI agents, noting that U.S. crypto policies are improving.

item.title: 21Shares Debuts First ETF Focused on Canton Network Crypto Token
item.description: The Nasdaq-listed fund offers exposure to Canton Coin, native token of the privacy-focused institutional blockchain network.

item.title: Tether executive warns the 2026 midterms could have 'seismic impact' on crypto industry
item.description: Jesse Spiro, Head of Government Affairs at Tether, said at Consensus Miami 2026 that the midterms will be a key test for whether crypto’s recent policy gains in Washington can survive politically.

item.title: Bitcoin Dips Below $80K as Analysts Say Profit-Taking Is on the Rise
item.description: Bitcoin briefly fell below $80,000 on Thursday as analysts say profit taking has increased among crypto traders.

item.title: Bitmine to slow down ether purchases as it nears accumulation goal, Tom Lee says
item.description: At the current pace of purchases, Lee said his Ethereum treasury giant would reach its 5% ether accumulation goal in six weeks, then shift its focus to staking and share buybacks.

item.title: 'DeFi is not dead,' it’s going mainstream with AI agents, crypto executives agree
item.description: DeFi and its underlying technology have already proved themselves at scale, said eToro CEO Yoni Assia.

item.title: Donald Trump Jr. denies rumors World Liberty Financial is falling apart
item.description: World Liberty Financial co-founder Donald Trump Jr. and co-founder and CEO Zach Witkoff pushed back on recent online rumors as the crypto firm battles Justin Sun in court.

item.title: Kalshi see valuation double to $22B after $1B raise as prediction markets boom
item.description: Fresh capital from top Wall Street and Silicon Valley firms signals increasing confidence in regulated event trading and retail prediction markets.

item.title: Trump-Backed American Bitcoin Shares Fall After $82 Million Q1 Loss
item.description: Shares in Eric Trump's mining firm American Bitcoin have fallen more than 9% after reporting a quarterly loss of nearly $82 million.

item.title: Samson Mow defends Strategy selling portions of its Bitcoin treasury
item.description: The Bitcoin advocate spoke up after Michael Saylor signaled that the company might sell some BTC, a major departure from the Strategy founder's previous rhetoric.

item.title: Amazon’s new AI wallet: AWS, Coinbase, and Stripe build payment rails for bots
item.description: Amazon said AI agents for now will be allowed to buy APIs, web content and other online services, but that future versions would enable hotel bookings, travel reservations and payments to merchants.

item.title: Bitcoin ending May above $76,000 would confirm new bull market, Tom Lee says
item.description: Tokenization and AI agentic finance are the main narratives driving the next bull cycle in crypto, Lee said at Consensus 2026.

item.title: The stablecoin queue: 20 banks and tech giants are waiting to issue tokens with Anchorage Digital
item.description: Since the Genius Act passed, Anchorage has won every single large stablecoin issuance mandate across the landscape, according to the firm’s CEO Nathan McCauley.

item.title: Amazon Teams With Coinbase and Stripe to Let AI Agents Pay With Stablecoins
item.description: The new Amazon Web Services system lets AI agents use the USDC stablecoin to pay for APIs, data, and online services.

item.title: Crypto Polo Cup returns for its fourth edition in Palm Beach during Consensus Miami week
item.description: Hosted by Luna PR, the fourth edition of the Crypto Polo Cup (CPC) will take place on May 9, 2026, at the Santa Clara Polo Club, alongside Consensus Miami.

item.title: Crypto Prediction Markets Explained: How the Blockchain Is Reshaping Forecasting
item.description: TL;DR Crypto prediction markets use blockchain technology to create liquid platforms for forecasting and hedging real-world events, driving massive growth… The post Crypto Prediction Markets Explained: How the Blockchain Is Reshaping Forec…

item.title: Tether's Medical AI Runs on Your Phone and Outperforms Models 16x Its Size
item.description: QVAC MedPsy squeezes clinical AI onto a smartphone, beating Google's MedGemma-27B on real-world scenarios while using three times fewer compute resources.

item.title: The great derivatives disconnect: Why 'negative' funding is actually a bullish signal for Bitcoin
item.description: Panelists are split on the four-year cycle's relevance, with year-end price targets varying widely from potentially not reaching a new high to possible targets of $150k or $250k.

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: Panther Protocol deploys privacy infrastructure on Polygon
item.description: After years of research, engineering, and community collaboration, Panther Protocol Foundation announced that Panther Protocol is now live on Polygon.

item.title: Ripple-linked XRP slips 25% below $1.42 as traders watch breakout
item.description: XRP pulled back even as Ripple and JPMorgan completed a cross-border tokenized Treasury settlement on XRPL, with price now testing whether the recent breakout structure can hold.

item.title: Germany weighs 2027 crypto tax overhaul as one-year holding rule under threat
item.description: Germany may overhaul its crypto tax rules from 2027, potentially curbing the country’s hallmark one-year tax-free holding rule as it tightens enforcement and seeks extra revenue.

item.title: Arbitrum vote to release $71M in frozen Kelp exploit ETH set to pass
item.description: The Snapshot vote would move the recovery effort toward a binding onchain Arbitrum governance proposal.

item.title: Prediction Market Kalshi Boosts Valuation to $22 Billion With Fresh $1 Billion Investment
item.description: Kalshi has another billion dollars to play with as the U.S. prediction market leader continues to grow at a rapid pace.

item.title: Kraken parent Payward to buy Reap in $600M stablecoin payments push
item.description: Kraken parent Payward agreed to buy Hong Kong-based Reap for up to $600 million, adding card issuance and stablecoin payment capabilities to its new B2B platform.

item.title: Crypto for Advisors: beneath the crypto surface
item.description: Beneath the stalled market, advisors and long-term investors are quietly building durable crypto allocations and are becoming more comfortable investing in this asset class.

item.title: The $700 million migration: Why Solv Protocol is ditching LayerZero for Chainlink
item.description: The combined migrations by Solv and Kelp shift nearly $1 billion in assets to Chainlink's CCIP, reflecting an industry "flight to quality."

item.title: Final Bosu is moving to Ethereum. 14th May. Details in the next post. 🧵 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYEFVX3lxTFAyRGRMcWw0OENZejlicl9OeGJvbUVVczdFZENDQV8xNkQxcm93NnpLRHBSOGVobU5ocW01R1pxakl2MUFBMWUzd1B5ZGN4WGNnbzJaSnRtMnJnWVh5ZUFxSw?oc=5" target="_blank">Final Bosu is moving to Ethereum. 14…

item.title: Polygon reduces block time to 1.75 seconds as payments push accelerates
item.description: Polygon delivered its first block time reduction upgrade since genesis, as the network seeks to position for more high-frequency applications such as private stablecoin payments.

item.title: XRP 'probably going to $12' as price holds historical bottom zone for months
item.description: XRP is retesting a key multi-year support zone that has historically preceded major rebounds, with analysts predicting a rally toward $12 if the level holds.

item.title: Kalshi confirms $1 billion raise at $22 billion valuation amid prediction market boom
item.description: Institutional trading volume surged 800% over the past six months on the platform, while annualized trading activity reached $178 billion despite growing regulatory scrutiny.

item.title: Aave to overhaul collateral and listing standards after KelpDAO exploit
item.description: The lending giant is expanding its asset listing criteria beyond financial risk to include cybersecurity and architecture, and wants the rest of DeFi to follow.

item.title: Google Found a Way to Make Local AI Up to 3x Faster—No New Hardware Required
item.description: Google's new Multi-Token Prediction drafters can make Gemma 4 run up to 3x faster on your own hardware—no cloud required, and no quality lost.

item.title: South Korea Ordains Robot Monk Ahead of Buddha’s Birthday
item.description: A Unitree Robotics humanoid joins the Jogye Order, South Korea's largest Buddhist sect.

item.title: Bitcoin tests Bollinger Bands breakout as creator flips bullish on BTC
item.description: A related MVRV indicator hit overheated levels last seen before bitcoin's late-2024 push to $100,000.

item.title: 'JaredfromSubway' bot front runs Vitalik Buterin's $4 token swap with $1 million in volume
item.description: The Ethereum co-founder, who has spent months campaigning against toxic MEV with proposals for encrypted mempools, just had one of his own swaps front-run and back-run by the network's most notorious sandwich bot.

item.title: Kraken Parent Acquires Asian Stablecoin Firm Reap for $600 Million: Bloomberg
item.description: The deal marks Kraken's largest acquisition as it pushes into Asian cross-border payments through stablecoin infrastructure.

item.title: South Korea confirms 22% crypto tax starting January 2027: Report
item.description: South Korea’s Finance Ministry has reportedly confirmed for the first time that a 22% tax on crypto gains will proceed as scheduled in January 2027.

item.title: Core Scientific posts $347M loss as AI hosting overtakes Bitcoin mining
item.description: Core Scientific mined 279 BTC in the quarter, down 45% from a year earlier, while its colocation business became its top revenue source.

item.title: Consensus Miami Day 3: Real-time coverage and highlights from on the ground
item.description: It's day three of Consensus Miami 2026 on Thursday. Stay tuned for updates throughout the day.

item.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: Bitcoin Cash (BCH) drops 1.2%, leading index lower
item.description: Near Protocol (NEAR), down 1% from Wednesday, was also an underperformer.

item.title: Bitwise enters tokenization in takeover of Superstate’s $267 million 'carry fund'
item.description: The crypto asset manager will take over Superstate’s $267 million USCC fund as tokenized investment products gain traction with institutions.

item.title: Bitcoin ETFs Post 5-Week Buying Streak as Hedges Unwind, Institutional Appetite Returns
item.description: Spot Bitcoin ETFs hit $108.76 billion in net assets as five weeks of inflows and fading put skew signal institutional demand is back.

item.title: Kraken to buy stablecoin payments firm Reap in $600 million deal: Bloomberg
item.description: Kraken owner Payward will acquire Hong Kong-based Reap Technologies as the crypto exchange expands its stablecoin and payments infrastructure business in Asia.

item.title: VanEck’s Sigel sees Bitcoin reaching $1M within five years
item.description: VanEck’s Matthew Sigel says Bitcoin may reach $1 million in five years, comparing adoption trends to the video game industry’s shift to mainstream use.

item.title: Bitcoin analysts say this level must break for BTC price to confirm bottom
item.description: A slowdown in profit-taking and reclaiming $88,000 as support are prerequisites for BTC to confirm cycle bottom.

item.title: White House Targets July 4 for Clarity Act Passage: Crypto Adviser
item.description: Senate Banking Committee markup is planned for this month, leaving four working Senate weeks in June for floor passage, said Patrick Witt.

item.title: Morning Minute: Morgan Stanley Is Coming for Coinbase
item.description: Morgan Stanley just launched crypto trading on ETrade, while the White House wants the Clarity Act signed by July 4.

item.title: DeFi Platform TrustedVolumes Hit by $6.7M Exploit
item.description: The liquidity resolver used by multiple DeFi protocols was hit, with DEX aggregator 1inch claiming no impact on its systems.

item.title: California man jailed for 78 months over $250M crypto theft conspiracy
item.description: Marlon Ferro, aka “GothFerrari,” broke into victims’ homes to steal hardware wallets when his co-conspirators couldn’t hack them remotely.

item.title: Bitcoin Bollinger Bands push key breakout as creator acts on positive signal
item.description: A new Bitcoin Bollinger Bands breakout attempt on the daily chart drew mixed reactions as the metric's creator, John Bollinger, revealed a fresh BTC position.

item.title: Changelly report highlights growing stablecoin use in everyday spending ahead of May 15 infrastructure discussion
item.description: Changelly uncovers the main stablecoin trends for 2026, and hosts a podcast with Stablerail on stablecoin infrastructure every business must build on May 15, 2026.

item.title: TrustedVolumes hit by $6.7M exploit as 1inch denies breach
item.description: 1inch said its protocols, infrastructure and user funds were not affected by the exploit targeting independent resolver TrustedVolumes.

item.title: Hardware Wallet Thief Gets 78 Months in Prison Over $250M Crypto 'Heist'
item.description: ‘GothFerrari’ was sentenced for his part in a criminal enterprise that stole crypto through social engineering and physical break-ins.

item.title: BNY eyes institutional Bitcoin, Ethereum custody for investors in UAE
item.description: BNY is partnering with Finstreet and ADI Foundation to offer regulated Bitcoin and Ethereum custody to UAE clients from the Abu Dhabi Global Market.

item.title: Luffa unveils major brand upgrade: Repositioned as AI × Web3 Super Connector
item.description: Luffa, the global leader in intelligent ecosystem platforms, today officially announced a major brand upgrade, repositioning itself as the AI × Web3 Super Connector.

item.title: BNY Expands Crypto Custody Push to Abu Dhabi BNY, the world’s largest custodian bank, plans to offer digital asset custody services in Abu Dhabi through local partners Finstreet and ADI Foundation, while building regulated digital asset infrastructure ancho - x.com

item.title: 🚨 UPDATE: Aave has liquidated the attacker's rsETH positions on Ethereum and Arbitrum. The recovered collateral now held by the Recovery Guardian as part of the ongoing restoration roadmap. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTFBTZXRMaHpzNnUyYXZwVzVQd3JOa2sta1BuWjZXUlloZk5CTUlFQWRyMzd2bzBMTS1uMERyYkxoLU1SSzBpbDZEU2I2cF9GTGg4ZXNRcjh4WkUwYUdqTVJjcFFIVEU?oc=5" target="_blank">🚨 UPDATE: Aave has liquidated …

item.title: 🚨 NEW: Momentum is building behind a US crypto bill that could establish clear regulations and support Trump’s push to make America a global crypto hub. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE9wV0d0NVJucWs4ejN5bUhxVjRTeE9XaERvSnZJdEh6eFpYX1NaaDE2aTVhTVhtSGRnblNRWlpSbTV1UDU3QlZwUHg5WVFNRGN3clptYmZFQ0E2eDhOc1RkY19DMVM?oc=5" target="_blank">🚨 NEW: Momentum is building be…

item.title: Pi Founder Chengdiao Fan spoke today at Consensus 2026 Miami in her session, “Aligning Web3, AI, and Blockchain for Utility.” Dr. Fan shared how Pi’s blockchain infrastructure, identity verification, and a globally engaged network can support utility-driven p - x.com
